svg.title: SeerAI B2B data architecture during service
svg.desc: Diagram showing how developer session data flows through per-developer encryption into SeerAI, where a surveillance firewall separates individual encrypted storage from aggregate-only employer analytics. The employer never accesses individual data.

g.text: Client-side encryption (per-developer keys, employer cannot access)

svg.text: Surveillance firewall — no individual data passes below this line

g.text: DPA defines scope — employer agreed at contract signing
